Music and Computers

DrumBox

  • To turn on or off drum beats, click on the rectangles.
  • Change the number of notes, or the number of beats, to get polyrhythms.
  • Type in a new BPM (Beats per Minute) and hit Enter to change the tempo.
  • To turn on or off notes in a melody, click on a column in the melody grid. Only one note per column may be selected. To turn off a note, click on it.
